xml.log: If there is an update when the file file is missing, go to Steam Client - Library List - mydockfinder - right-click menu - Properties - Local File - Verify software file integrity If the desktop icon is not displayed after enabling pre-stage scheduling, you can right-click on the desktop-view-display desktop icon to enable display desktop icon If using MSI afterburner will cause irregular freezing or crashing issues, you can set it in MSI afterburner, add dock_64.exe, then select dock_64.exe, and finally select "None" on the right side. Changelog 1.Fixed the issue in the previous version where checking Recycle Bin files with a network drive caused lag 2.Fixed the issue where icons did not appear in the left-side list of some system preference interfaces 3.Fixed component rendering anomalies from the previous beta 4.Fixed the freezing issue caused after connecting or disconnecting multiple screens in all previous versions 5.Optimized dock window preview when there are too many windows 6.Optimized dock window preview, showing a list when there are too many windows to prevent incomplete display 7.Adapted for WPS and Discord, optimized to display only one icon for the program 8.Fixed crash caused by window display animation after sleep/wake 9.Fixed Finder monitoring highlights not working after restart 10.Fixed issue where some programs' icons did not appear in the Finder tray 11.Fixed freezing issue when displaying the dock on multiple screens and switching between them 12.Fixed duplicate Baidu Cloud tray icon display in the previous version 13.Fixed misalignment of Launchpad icon when dock is displayed at the top of the screen 14.Fixed occasional missing reflection issue when dock immersive mode and icon reflection are enabled simultaneously 15.Optimized Finder immersive mode detection, fixed freezing caused by MyFinder immersive mode in all previous versions 16.Fixed abnormal pop-up issues caused by some system audio devices 17.Fixed failure to open the Start menu in some system displays 18.Fixed occasional issue where the front desk scheduling window list could not be activated when multiple windows were in the foreground 19.Optimized Finder hidden mouse activation, automatically blocking window close button area to prevent accidental clicks when closing windows 20.Added global rendering frame rate option: if the monitor is below 90Hz, can set up to 90Hz; above 90Hz, can set to the monitor's maximum refresh rate. Found in Preferences - Global Settings 21.Fixed window close animation failure caused by the Win11 AI component 22.Fixed issue where exiting DockFinder would cancel the system's auto-hide taskbar if the system taskbar was not hidden via DockFinder 23.Optimized window minimize animation rendering smoothness 24.Fixed issue in previous versions where continuously activating windows would cause front desk scheduling to repeatedly activate windows
